title: Store.remove_reservation is defined but never called
evidence: catalog/store.py:33 remove_reservation() has no caller — return_book (catalog/loans.py:41) and cancel both route through cancel_reservation() instead; this dead line is likely the single uncovered line behind test_coverage=0.99 in scores.json
suggestion: Remove the unused method (or route fulfilment/cancel through it) to reach full coverage and avoid duplicate removal logic
